title: corbularia graellsii
intro: Corbularia graellsii, also known as Spanish broom or broom shrub, is a type of flowering plant in the Fabaceae family native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Corbularia graellsii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Corbularia graellsii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
